privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: PDF Worker is a client-side web application. All PDF processing happens entirely in your browser — your files are never uploaded to any server.
privacy.no_upload_title: Your Files Stay on Your Device
privacy.no_upload_text: All PDF operations (merge, split, compress, rotate, etc.) are performed locally in your browser using JavaScript. No file is ever sent to a remote server. We have no access to your documents.
privacy.data_collected_text: We do not collect personal data. The only information stored locally on your device is:
privacy.cookies_locale: stores your language preference locally on your device.
privacy.cookies_adsense: may place cookies to serve personalized ads. You can manage this via your cookie consent choice.
privacy.adsense_text: We use Google AdSense to display ads. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this or other websites. Google's use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads based on your visit to this site and/or other sites on the Internet.
privacy.adsense_optout: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings (https://adssettings.google.com).
privacy.third_party_text: This site may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of other sites.
privacy.children_text: This service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
privacy.contact_text: For questions about this Privacy Policy, you can reach us through the project's GitHub repository.
cookie.message: This site uses cookies for advertising via Google AdSense. Your PDF files are never uploaded or shared. See our
tools.flatten-pdf.name: Flatten PDF
tools.flatten-pdf.description: Flatten form fields and annotations into static content.
tools.pdf-to-text.name: PDF to Text
tools.pdf-to-text.description: Extract all text content from a PDF document.
tools.merge-pdf.how_text: Combine multiple PDF documents into one file directly in your browser. No upload needed — your files stay on your device.
tools.merge-pdf.step_1: Select or drag and drop multiple PDF files.
tools.merge-pdf.step_2: Arrange files in the desired order.
tools.merge-pdf.step_3: Click Merge PDF and download the result.
tools.merge-pdf.faq_1_q: Is there a limit on how many PDFs I can merge?
tools.merge-pdf.faq_1_a: No hard limit. Since processing happens in your browser, it depends on your device's memory. Most devices handle dozens of files easily.
tools.merge-pdf.faq_2_q: Are my files uploaded to a server?
tools.merge-pdf.faq_2_a: No. All processing happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
tools.merge-pdf.faq_3_q: Can I change the order of pages?
tools.merge-pdf.faq_3_a: Yes. You can reorder the files before merging. For page-level control, use the Organize PDF tool.
tools.split-pdf.how_text: Extract specific pages or split a PDF into multiple documents. Everything runs in your browser.
tools.split-pdf.step_2: Choose to split all pages or select a range.
tools.split-pdf.step_3: Click Split PDF and download the results.
tools.split-pdf.faq_1_a: Yes. Use range mode and enter page numbers like 1-3, 5, 7-9.
tools.split-pdf.faq_2_q: What format are the output files?
tools.split-pdf.faq_2_a: Each split produces a standard PDF file. You can download them individually or as a ZIP.
tools.compress-pdf.how_text: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining visual quality. Choose from three compression levels.
tools.compress-pdf.step_2: Select a compression level (low, medium, or high).
tools.compress-pdf.step_3: Click Compress PDF and download the smaller file.
tools.compress-pdf.faq_1_q: How much can I reduce the file size?
tools.compress-pdf.faq_1_a: It depends on the content. Image-heavy PDFs can be reduced by 50-80%. Text-only PDFs may see smaller reductions.
tools.compress-pdf.faq_2_a: Low compression preserves near-original quality. High compression reduces quality more but achieves smaller file sizes.
tools.rotate-pdf.how_text: Rotate all pages of a PDF by 90°, 180°, or 270°. Perfect for fixing scanned documents.
tools.rotate-pdf.faq_1_a: Currently, rotation applies to all pages. For individual page control, use the Organize tool to remove unwanted pages.
tools.watermark-pdf.how_title: How to Add a Watermark to PDF
tools.watermark-pdf.how_text: Add text or image watermarks to your PDF documents. Customize position, opacity, size, and rotation.
tools.watermark-pdf.step_2: Choose text or image watermark and customize options.
tools.watermark-pdf.step_3: Position the watermark on the preview and click Add Watermark.
tools.watermark-pdf.faq_1_q: Can I use an image as watermark?
tools.watermark-pdf.faq_1_a: Yes. You can upload a PNG or JPG image and adjust its size, opacity, and position.
tools.pdf-to-jpg.how_title: How to Convert PDF to JPG
tools.pdf-to-jpg.how_text: Convert each page of a PDF into a high-quality JPG image. Adjust quality settings to balance size and clarity.
tools.pdf-to-jpg.step_3: Click Convert to JPG and download images.
tools.pdf-to-jpg.faq_1_a: 80% offers a good balance. Use 100% for maximum quality or lower values for smaller files.
tools.jpg-to-pdf.how_title: How to Convert Images to PDF
tools.jpg-to-pdf.how_text: Convert JPG, PNG, or WebP images into a PDF document. Set orientation and margins.
tools.jpg-to-pdf.step_3: Click Convert to PDF and download.
tools.jpg-to-pdf.faq_1_a: JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are supported.
tools.protect-pdf.how_title: How to Password Protect a PDF
tools.protect-pdf.how_text: Add password protection to your PDF files. Set user and owner passwords with custom permissions.
tools.protect-pdf.step_3: Click Protect PDF and download the secured file.
tools.protect-pdf.faq_1_q: What is the difference between user and owner password?
tools.protect-pdf.faq_1_a: The user password is needed to open the file. The owner password controls permissions like printing and copying.
tools.unlock-pdf.how_text: Remove password protection from a PDF file. You need to know the current password.
tools.unlock-pdf.step_3: Click Unlock PDF and download the unprotected file.
tools.unlock-pdf.faq_1_q: Can I unlock a PDF without the password?
tools.unlock-pdf.faq_1_a: No. You need to provide the correct password to remove protection.
tools.organize-pdf.how_text: Reorder, delete, or duplicate pages in your PDF using a visual drag-and-drop interface.
tools.organize-pdf.step_2: Drag pages to reorder. Use buttons to duplicate or delete.
tools.organize-pdf.faq_1_a: Yes. Click the duplicate button on any page thumbnail to create a copy.
tools.crop-pdf.how_text: Trim margins or crop PDF pages to a specific area. Adjust crop values for each side.
tools.crop-pdf.step_2: Adjust the crop area on the preview.
tools.pdf-to-png.how_title: How to Convert PDF to PNG
tools.pdf-to-png.how_text: Convert PDF pages to high-quality PNG images with optional transparent background.
tools.pdf-to-png.step_3: Click Convert to PNG and download.
tools.redact-pdf.how_text: Permanently black out sensitive content in your PDF. Redacted areas cannot be recovered.
tools.redact-pdf.step_2: Draw rectangles over content to redact.
tools.redact-pdf.faq_1_a: Yes. Redacted content is permanently removed and cannot be recovered.
tools.edit-pdf.how_text: Add text, shapes, and freehand drawings to your PDF documents.
tools.edit-pdf.step_2: Add text blocks, rectangles, or draw freehand.
tools.sign-pdf.how_text: Add your signature to PDF documents. Draw a signature or upload a signature image.
tools.sign-pdf.step_2: Draw your signature or upload an image.
tools.sign-pdf.step_3: Position the signature and click Apply Signature.
tools.sign-pdf.faq_1_q: Is this a legally binding digital signature?
tools.sign-pdf.faq_1_a: This adds a visual signature to the document. For legally binding digital signatures (PAdES/P7M), a qualified certificate is required.
tools.extract-images.how_title: How to Extract Images from PDF
tools.extract-images.how_text: Extract all embedded images from a PDF document as individual PNG files.
tools.extract-images.step_3: Download individual images or all as a ZIP.
tools.grayscale-pdf.how_title: How to Convert PDF to Grayscale
tools.grayscale-pdf.how_text: Convert a color PDF to black and white. Useful for printing or reducing visual complexity.
tools.resize-pdf.how_text: Change the page size of your PDF to A4, A3, Letter, or Legal format.
tools.page-numbers.how_title: How to Add Page Numbers to PDF
tools.page-numbers.how_text: Add page numbers to your PDF documents. Choose position and format.
tools.page-numbers.step_3: Click Add Page Numbers and download.
tools.header-footer.how_title: How to Add Header and Footer to PDF
tools.header-footer.how_text: Add custom header and footer text to your PDF. Use placeholders for page numbers.
tools.header-footer.step_3: Click Apply Header & Footer and download.
tools.flatten-pdf.how_text: Flatten form fields and annotations into static content. Useful before sharing or archiving.
tools.flatten-pdf.step_1: Upload a PDF file with form fields.
tools.flatten-pdf.faq_1_a: It converts interactive form fields and annotations into static page content that can no longer be edited.
tools.pdf-to-text.how_title: How to Extract Text from PDF
tools.pdf-to-text.how_text: Extract all text content from a PDF document and save it as a plain text file.
tools.pdf-to-text.faq_1_q: Does this work with scanned PDFs?
tools.pdf-to-text.faq_1_a: No. This extracts embedded text only. Scanned documents contain images and would require OCR.
error.title: Something went wrong
home.no_results: No tools found. Try a different search.
blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips, tutorials and guides for working with PDF files
blog.meta_description: Discover tips, tutorials and best practices for working with PDF files. Free guides on merging, splitting, compressing, converting and editing PDFs online.
